meta-description: Learn about authorized representatives by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Authorized representative
excerpt: Someone who you choose to act on your behalf with the Marketplace, like a family member or other trusted person. Some authorized representatives may have legal authority to act on your behalf.
content: Someone who you choose to act on your behalf with the Marketplace, like a family member or other trusted person. Some authorized representatives may have legal authority to act on your behalf.
